sceneImageNode.title: Generate Image
sceneImageNode.promptPlaceholder: Generate an image based on the provided reference images and storyboard script, with reasonable scene structure, lighting atmosphere, strong narrative sense, and high-quality finished product that meets the standards of film and television animation storyboards.

sceneVideoNode.title: Generate Video
sceneVideoNode.promptPlaceholder: Generate a video based on the provided material images, strictly following the content, composition, and style of the original images, to create a dynamic video with coherent logic, natural movements, realistic lighting, and smooth transitions.
